title: taraxacum stylosum
intro: Taraxacum stylosum, also known as the upright dandelion or yellow dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, flowers, and roots, which contain compounds like taraxasterol and flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Taraxacum stylosum has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, liver and kidney disease, and skin conditions, and is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing blood pressure and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum stylosum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or topically to take advantage of the plant's medicinal properties.
